description: Create a Symbol Digit Modalities Test (SDMT) in PsychoPy Builder where participants match symbols to numbers based on a reference key. The experiment must run for exactly 90 seconds regardless of the number of trials completed. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sdmt_task.psyexp and the conditions file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/sdmt_conditions.csv. The conditions file must define the mappings: @=1, #=2, $=3, %=4, &=5, *=6, (=7, )=8, !=9. The experiment must include an instruction phase and a randomized trial phase that displays the reference key and target symbols while recording keyboard responses 1-9.
